/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -flto -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/aegis_engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o aegis_engine  ../gateway/libgateway.a ../pipeline/libpipeline.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lrdkafka++
